title: Dance of the Dragons: The Civil War Begins #got #shorts
description: After the death of a king, the Targaryen dynasty turned on itself. This is the beginning of the most destructive war in Westeros history. #ASOIAF #Targaryen #Shorts

scenes.narration: The Targaryens conquered the world with dragons—but in the end, dragons would tear them apart.
scenes.image_prompt: two dragons facing each other in dark storm, tension building, cinematic fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: After the death of King Viserys, a single question divided the realm—who should rule next?
scenes.image_prompt: empty Iron Throne in dim light with shadows approaching, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: On one side stood Rhaenyra, the chosen heir, backed by those who believed in her claim.
scenes.image_prompt: Rhaenyra standing with dragon behind her, determined presence, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: On the other stood Aegon, crowned in secret, supported by those who refused to accept her rule.
scenes.image_prompt: Aegon crowned in shadowy ceremony, tense atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What began as a question of succession quickly became something far more dangerous.
scenes.image_prompt: two factions forming with banners and armies dividing, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The realm split into two sides—black and green—each preparing for war.
scenes.image_prompt: two opposing forces facing each other across battlefield, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But this was not a normal war—it was a war between dragonriders.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple dragons rising behind both factions, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Families turned against each other, alliances shattered, and trust vanished overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: family members facing off with tension and betrayal, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What followed would become the bloodiest chapter in Targaryen history.
scenes.image_prompt: battlefield filled with fire, dragons, and destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because this time, the greatest threat to the dragons… was themselves.
scenes.image_prompt: two dragons colliding mid-air in fiery clash, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
